steps.title: Identify what the researcher needs to support
steps.content: The researcher claims that lakes have seen a decline in ice duration between the early 1980s and the mid-2000s. To cite a “typical example,” the data must show this decline by comparing both time periods.

steps.title: Find the lake that demonstrates the decline
steps.content: Choice B directly shows the decline: Kitusjärvi had fewer days of ice in 2005–06 than in 1980–81. The other choices either show only a single time period (A and D) or show an increase rather than the claimed decline (C). That matches choice B — B is correct.
